creator: eric.douzet@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

I doesn't can compile this package after update for clang

product# portupgrade -aOW
--->  Upgrading 'llvm-3.1' to 'llvm-3.2' (devel/llvm)
--->  Building '/usr/ports/devel/llvm'
===>  Cleaning for llvm-3.2
===>  Found saved configuration for llvm-3.1
=> llvm-3.2.src.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://llvm.org/releases/3.2/llvm-3.2.src.tar.gz
fetch: http://llvm.org/releases/3.2/llvm-3.2.src.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 12275252, actual 12275082
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/llvm-3.2.src.tar.gz
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/llvm-3.2.src.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/llvm.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/llvm.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade20130114-18774-1lcq885 env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=llvm-3.1 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=3.1 make
** Fix the problem and try again.
--->  Skipping 'lang/clang' (clang-3.1_2) because a requisite package 'llvm-3.1' (devel/llvm) failed (specify -k to force)
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
	! devel/llvm (llvm-3.1)	(fetch error)
	* lang/clang (clang-3.1_2)
product# 


Best regards,

Eric Douzet
